code: import React from'react';import{PieChart,Pie,Cell,Tooltip,ResponsiveContainer,Legend}from'recharts';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const COLORS=['#38bdf8','#34d399','#fbbf24','#f97316','#a855f7'];const STATUS_LABELS={open:'Abierto',in_progress:'En progreso',awaiting_client:'Esperando cliente',resolved:'Resuelto',closed:'Cerrado'};export default function StatusPieChart(_ref){let{data=[]}=_ref;const chartData=data.map((item,index)=>({name:STATUS_LABELS[item._id]||item._id||"Estado ".concat(index+1),value:item.total||0}));if(!chartData.length){return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"chart-card",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{children:"Estado de tickets"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:"No hay datos suficientes."})]});}return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"chart-card",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{children:"Estado de tickets"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(ResponsiveContainer,{width:"100%",height:260,children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(PieChart,{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Pie,{data:chartData,dataKey:"value",nameKey:"name",innerRadius:60,outerRadius:100,children:chartData.map((entry,index)=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Cell,{fill:COLORS[index%COLORS.length]},"slice-".concat(entry.name)))}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Tooltip,{}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Legend,{})]})})]});}
